videos.headline: Brendon Lewis' 45-yard heave gets Nevada on the board
videos.description: Brendon Lewis finds Cortez Braham Jr. up the seam for a 45-yard Nevada touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brendon Lewis' 45-yard heave gets Nevada on the board) 2024/12/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: UNLV come away with strip-sack TD
videos.description: Brendon Lewis is drilled against his own end zone as Jackson Woodard recovers it for a UNLV touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UNLV come away with strip-sack TD) 2024/12/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nate Burleson II makes a phenomenal catch, lands out of bounds
videos.description: Nate Burleson II climbs the ladder and "Mosses" his defender for a spectacular catch, but can't get his feet down in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nate Burleson II makes a phenomenal catch, lands out of bounds) 2024/12/01 ESHEET
